data.scene: User enables app lock; verification triggers on app start or return from background.
data.purpose: Verify user identity via biometrics to prevent unauthorized access.
data.frequency: Every time the app comes to the foreground
data.recipient: Device-local only (result never leaves the device)
data.thirdparty: No third-party involvement; biometric verification handled by Android TEE

permissions.name: Biometric permission (implicitly via BiometricPrompt)
permissions.scene: When enabling app lock or verifying identity
permissions.purpose: Verify user identity via fingerprint or face recognition
permissions.impact: If denied, app lock will be unavailable; device credential (PIN/password) can be used as alternative
